# Internal Fixture Overview Sync Skill

Return output in Japanese.

## Trigger Conditions

- Keep one shared overview workflow reusable.
- Summarize stable maintenance guidance for related reports.

## Workflow

1. Compare overview notes across related skills.
2. Keep the response concise and safe.
